verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Peace, bringing it all to peace The storm surrounding me Let it break at Your name

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Still, call the sea to still The rage in me to still Every wave at Your name

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus, Jesus, You make the darkness tremble Jesus, Jesus, You silence fear Jesus, Jesus, You make the darkness tremble Jesus, Jesus

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Breathe, then call these bones to live Call these lungs to sing Once again, I will praise

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Your name is a light that the shadows can't deny Your name cannot be overcome Your name is alive forever lifted high Your name cannot be overcome
